description_long: This is a rustic wooden bed with a robust, rectangular frame constructed from thick, textured wooden beams. The bed features both a headboard and a footboard, each made from horizontal wooden planks supported by sturdy vertical posts at the corners. The mattress is topped with a red and black checkered blanket, and a beige sheet is partially visible at the head of the bed. The wood has a rough, natural finish, giving the bed a handcrafted, log-cabin appearance. The overall design is simple yet solid, with no visible storage or decorative elements beyond the natural wood grain. This bed would be suitable for a cozy, rustic urban setting such as a cabin-themed room or a park shelter.
description: A rustic wooden bed with a thick, textured frame, checkered blanket, and both headboard and footboard. The design is sturdy and handcrafted, with a natural wood finish.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the bed, the checkered blanket, and the headboard and footboard.
description_view_1: End view highlighting the footboard's horizontal planks and the thickness of the wooden posts.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, displaying the blanket, mattress, and the headboard and footboard from the other side.
description_view_3: End view from the headboard side, showing the headboard's horizontal planks and the start of the beige sheet.
